story.title: Anora
story.logline: A young dancer's marriage to a wealthy heir puts her at the center of a family power struggle.

perspectives.storytelling: Ani fights to preserve dignity and agency while others attempt to define her future.
Igor pressures Ani to accept a pragmatic view of survival inside a coercive system.
Competing interests collide around money, image, and control of the marriage.
Their relationship shifts from antagonism to uneasy mutual recognition.

players.name: Anora Mikheeva
players.visual: A young dancer with a confident public persona.
players.audio: Quick, sharp, and defensive when cornered.
players.summary: A protagonist trying to hold onto self-worth under pressure.
players.bio: Ani is a young woman fighting to preserve her own sense of worth inside systems eager to commodify her.
players.storytelling: Ani resists being reduced to a bargaining chip.

motivations.illustration: pushing toward a version of life that belongs to her rather than to the people trying to buy or manage her
motivations.storytelling: Ani keeps driving forward toward independence, even when every compromise asks her to settle.

motivations.illustration: turning over the implications of each offer, promise, and threat around the marriage
motivations.storytelling: Ani repeatedly weighs what each new development means for her freedom and self-respect.

players.name: Igor
players.visual: Reserved enforcer with controlled body language.
players.summary: A pressure force pushing Ani toward a harsher worldview.
players.bio: Igor operates from within a coercive machine and has learned to survive through restraint and practical compromise.
players.storytelling: Igor challenges Ani's assumptions about freedom and safety.

motivations.illustration: stepping in with practical assistance when Ani is cornered by the people controlling the situation
motivations.storytelling: Igor helps in concrete ways, offering cover and small acts of protection inside a hostile system.

motivations.illustration: holding back from the most dehumanizing options even when they would be easier
motivations.storytelling: Igor's sense of conscience keeps surfacing whenever the job demands he ignore Ani's humanity.

players.name: Ivan 'Vanya' Zakharov
players.visual: A wealthy, impulsive young heir moving through the world with careless entitlement.
players.audio: Restless, immature speech that pivots quickly from charm to panic.
players.summary: The privileged son whose recklessness triggers the central conflict around the marriage.
players.bio: Vanya is the Russian heir whose impulsive relationship with Ani pulls her into the power struggle controlled by his family.
players.storytelling: Vanya chases pleasure until consequences appear, then tries to back away from what he started.

motivations.illustration: dodging the obligations and fallout created by his sudden marriage
motivations.storytelling: Vanya tries to slip out of responsibility as soon as the relationship threatens his comfort.

motivations.illustration: backtracking on grand romantic gestures once family pressure closes in
motivations.storytelling: He quickly reconsiders his commitment when the reality of the situation becomes unavoidable.

dynamics.summary: Ani secures practical freedom from the arrangement.
dynamics.storytelling: The external conflict resolves in Ani's favor, but not without cost.

dynamics.summary: Ani ends with stronger internal self-definition.
dynamics.storytelling: She leaves with clearer boundaries and restored self-respect.

storypoints.illustration: securing independent control over her life
storypoints.summary: The objective effort centers on escaping coercive control.
storypoints.storytelling: Ani's conflict focuses on tangible autonomy and legal freedom.

storypoints.summary: Ani over-relies on controlling every interaction.
storypoints.storytelling: Her defensive control tactics escalate pressure and conflict.

storybeats.summary: Ani experiences the immediate thrill and danger of rapid escalation.
storybeats.storytelling: The marriage appears to offer escape but quickly reveals hidden constraints.

storybeats.summary: The family applies escalating leverage to force compliance.
storybeats.storytelling: Each negotiation reveals deeper asymmetries in power and intent.

overviews.label: Logline
overviews.summary: A fast-moving relationship drama about power, class, and agency.
overviews.storytelling: A character-driven narrative where each turning point reframes who has leverage.

overviews.label: Genre
overviews.summary: Romantic drama with pressure-cooker social conflict.
overviews.storytelling: The tone shifts from impulsive romance to coercive family confrontation.

moments.summary: A sudden marriage changes the stakes.
moments.synopsis: Ani's choice creates immediate conflict with a wealthy family determined to reverse it.
moments.setting: Las Vegas and later New York.
moments.imperatives: Establish desire, leverage, and first consequences.
